default_decision.reason: default deny for non-scheduled events to avoid noisy live notifications

rules.name: scheduled_dispatch
rules.reason: scheduled regressions may dispatch to the routed digest or oncall channel

rules.name: manual_override_dispatch
rules.reason: manual runs may dispatch only when an operator explicitly overrides the route

rules.name: manual_high_severity_dispatch
rules.reason: manual degraded runs may dispatch to feishu for fast triage
